apiDocs.loadFailedDesc: Make sure your account is signed in and has API docs permission, then retry.

runtimeConfig.archiveBatchHelp: Maximum rows read from the hot table and written to history per round. Controls single-batch archive pressure.
runtimeConfig.archiveConditionHelp: Enter only backend-supported safe filter fragments to narrow archive scope and avoid unbounded scans.
runtimeConfig.archiveDelayDaysHelp: Extra days to delay archiving after the hot retention window, avoiding data that may still change.
runtimeConfig.archiveDatabaseHelp: Data source name used by the archive job. Empty uses main.
runtimeConfig.archiveDeleteBatchHelp: Maximum rows deleted from the hot table per round. Keep it less than or equal to archive batch size.
runtimeConfig.archiveDeleteConditionHelp: Additional safety filter for deleting hot-table rows. Keep it aligned with or stricter than archive filters.
runtimeConfig.archiveDeleteDisabledHelp: When enabled, data is written to history but not deleted from the hot table. Useful for gray runs or observation.
runtimeConfig.archiveEnabledHelp: When disabled, the draft is still published but the runtime will not execute this archive job.
runtimeConfig.archiveFormGuide: Archive job drafts only save configuration and do not change data immediately
runtimeConfig.archiveFormGuideDesc: After publishing runtime config, the backend executes archive work according to window, batch, and delete policies.
runtimeConfig.archiveFormGuideExtra: Before publishing, confirm hot table, time column, batches, and delete policy. Disable delete first when observing.
runtimeConfig.archiveHistoryTableNameRuleHelp: History table naming rule. Keep it aligned with backend archive table creation and routing.
runtimeConfig.archiveHistoryTablePrefixHelp: History table name prefix used to create or locate archived tables.
runtimeConfig.archiveHotKeepDaysHelp: Days to keep data in the hot table. Older data becomes archive candidates.
runtimeConfig.archiveNameHelp: Operator-facing archive draft name. Include the business table and archive purpose.
runtimeConfig.archivePrimaryKeyHelp: Column used as the cursor for archiving and deletion. It must be stable and sortable.
runtimeConfig.archiveQueryWriteDbHelp: Read the hot table from the primary database to avoid replica lag affecting archive windows.
runtimeConfig.archiveRemarkHelp: Record purpose, change reason, delete policy, or publishing notes.
runtimeConfig.archiveSortOrderHelp: Sort value used in draft display and release snapshots. Lower values appear earlier.
runtimeConfig.archiveSplitUnitHelp: History table split unit, such as day or month. Must match the history table naming rule.
runtimeConfig.archiveStartAtHelp: Optional RFC3339 first start point used to control the first archive window.
runtimeConfig.archiveTableNameHelp: Current hot data table. Archive and delete operations are based on this table.
runtimeConfig.archiveTimeColumnHelp: Time column used to determine hot/cold windows. It must be backed by a suitable index.
runtimeConfig.archiveWindowSecondsHelp: Time-window length processed in one archive round. Larger windows increase scan pressure.
runtimeConfig.fillArchiveRequired: Please fill in name and hot table
runtimeConfig.fillPeriodicRequired: Please fill in name and workflow
runtimeConfig.importDescription: Import current task_periodic and archive_jobs runtime lists, then publish them as the first or next version.
runtimeConfig.importSuccess: Current runtime config imported and published
runtimeConfig.introDescription: Saving only writes drafts. Publish, rollback, and import create an active release and refresh table-cache version keys. YAML-only configs such as workflows.user_tag stay in YAML.
runtimeConfig.introTitle: Only task_periodic and archive_jobs runtime list configs are managed here
runtimeConfig.mfaHint: Publish, rollback, and import require MFA confirmation.
runtimeConfig.name: Name
runtimeConfig.matchedDraftsDesc: Total periodic task drafts under the current filters
runtimeConfig.periodicEnabledHelp: When disabled, the draft is still published but the runtime will not schedule this periodic task.
runtimeConfig.periodicFormGuide: Periodic task drafts only save configuration and do not enter runtime immediately
runtimeConfig.periodicFormGuideDesc: After publishing runtime config, the backend creates a new active release from schedules, workflow entrypoints, and dedupe settings.
runtimeConfig.periodicFormGuideExtra: Fill Cron or Every Seconds at minimum. Workflow must be a backend-registered workflow.
runtimeConfig.periodicCronHelp: Second-level Cron expression, for example 0 */5 * * * *. Fill Cron or Every Seconds at minimum.
runtimeConfig.periodicDeadlineHelp: Optional RFC3339 deadline. The task will no longer be scheduled after it.
runtimeConfig.periodicEverySecondsHelp: Fixed interval in seconds. Useful for simple periodic tasks; fill it or Cron at minimum.
runtimeConfig.periodicGrayPercentHelp: Gray rollout percentage from 0 to 100. Use it for gradual rollout.
runtimeConfig.periodicNameHelp: Operator-facing draft name. Include the business domain and schedule purpose.
runtimeConfig.periodicQueueHelp: Queue for enqueued tasks. Empty or default uses the default queue.
runtimeConfig.periodicRemarkHelp: Record purpose, change reason, or publishing notes.
runtimeConfig.periodicRetryHelp: Retry count after a single execution failure, avoiding immediate failure on transient errors.
runtimeConfig.periodicShardTotalHelp: Total shard count used by the backend for concurrent shard execution.
runtimeConfig.periodicSortOrderHelp: Sort value used in draft display and release snapshots. Lower values appear earlier.
runtimeConfig.periodicTargetsHelp: Execution targets, one per line or comma-separated. Parsed by the backend workflow.
runtimeConfig.periodicTimeoutSecondsHelp: Execution timeout in seconds for one task run, preventing long worker occupation.
runtimeConfig.periodicUniqueKeyHelp: Schedule dedupe key. Duplicate triggers in the same schedule window are deduped by TTL.
runtimeConfig.periodicUniqueTtlSecondsHelp: Dedupe key TTL in seconds. 0 means no extra TTL is set.
runtimeConfig.periodicWorkbenchDesc: Manage periodic task drafts, schedules, workflow entrypoints, and dedupe parameters. Only published drafts enter the active release.
runtimeConfig.periodicWorkflowHelp: Backend-registered workflow name. Published schedules call this entrypoint.
runtimeConfig.pollIntervalDesc: DB mode only polls active version state
runtimeConfig.publishDescription: Publish reads the current draft, creates an immutable snapshot, and refreshes runtime config cache.
runtimeConfig.rollbackDescription: Rollback creates a new version from a historical snapshot and refreshes runtime config cache.
runtimeConfig.runtimeFormArchiveBasicDesc: Define the archive job name, data source, and hot table entrypoint.
runtimeConfig.runtimeFormArchiveWindowDesc: Control time-column split, retention days, archive delay, and first start point.
runtimeConfig.runtimeFormBasicDesc: Define draft name, workflow entrypoint, queue, and sort order.
runtimeConfig.runtimeFormBatchDeleteDesc: Control archive batch, delete batch, delete switch, and write-database query policy.
runtimeConfig.runtimeFormConditionsDesc: Only enter backend-supported archive/delete filters to avoid unbounded scans.
runtimeConfig.runtimeFormDedupeDesc: Set unique key and TTL to avoid duplicate enqueues in the same schedule window.
runtimeConfig.runtimeFormExecutionDesc: Configure sharding, gray rollout, retries, and timeout boundaries.
runtimeConfig.runtimeFormHistoryTableDesc: Define history table prefix and naming rule. Keep it aligned with backend archive logic.
runtimeConfig.runtimeFormPayloadDesc: Targets support one per line or comma-separated values. Remark helps review before publishing.
runtimeConfig.runtimeFormScheduleDesc: Cron or Every Seconds is required so the draft can participate in scheduling.
runtimeConfig.selectReleaseHint: Select a snapshot from release history.
runtimeConfig.snapshotChanged: Draft differs from current runtime state
runtimeConfig.snapshotPreviewDescription: The preview is based on currently loaded draft pages. Backend validation and release snapshot are authoritative before publishing.
runtimeConfig.snapshotSame: Loaded draft page matches runtime state
runtimeConfig.sourceDatabaseDesc: Release snapshot is the only runtime source
